title: paronychia capitata var. querioides
intro: Paronychia capitata var. querioides, also known as Querida, is a plant species belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family, characterized by its unique, five-petaled flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paronychia capitata var. querioides include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea, or used topically as a poultice to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
